description: Normalized competitor comparison data keyed by query spec. Covers roll labels, folding cartons, and stand-up pouches. Each query maps to a set of competitor results. Internal label prices are calculated from LABEL_SALES_TIERS. Internal box/pouch prices are pending model documentation.

roll_labels.note: Matte and Gloss lamination are included in frame price. Soft Touch adds 10%. Holo adds flat $20.

folding_cartons.note: Internal pricing model pending documentation. Flow: 15K → Nobelus lamination → Scodix (optional) → Moll Cutter → Moll Folder-Gluer. Pricing depends on flat sheet size, substrate (14pt–24pt cardstock), coating, and run length.

stand_up_pouches.note: Internal pricing model pending documentation. Flow: 6K press → GM Die-Cutter (lamination) → Karlville Poucher. Pricing depends on pouch dimensions, gusset, material (BOPP/white/clear/foil), and quantity.

queries.query_label: 3" × 3" square label, 5000 pcs, White BOPP, Matte lamination, CMYK

our_price.note: Matte lamination included in frame price. 36 fits/frame = floor(12/3.24) × floor(39/3.24) = 3 × 12.

closest_data_point.description: Roll Labels 3"×3" White BOPP, 5,000 qty
closest_data_point.spec_delta: exact match — size, material, qty all confirmed

competitor_results.notes: Bootstrap dropdown size selection + Angular scope read. 6-day turnaround. Shipping not included.

closest_data_point.description: Roll Labels Rounded Square W=3/H=3 injected via Cimpress API, 5,000 qty
closest_data_point.spec_delta: qty=5000 (matches). W=3/H=3 injected via Node.js — size not DOM-confirmed.

competitor_results.notes: DIRECTIONAL — W=3/H=3 injected into Cimpress API alongside Rounded Square selection. Size not confirmed via DOM. To verify: open VP in DevTools, select Rounded Square, check for selections[Custom Width] in Cimpress XHR.

closest_data_point.description: Roll Labels 3" x 4" (closest available), 250 qty default
closest_data_point.spec_delta: size=3x4 (not 3x3 — no 3x3 in configurator); qty=250 (max standard=2500, 5k = custom quote)

competitor_results.notes: Standard configurator at /product/roll-labels-335 has NO 3x3 option. Available sizes: 2×3, 2×3.5, 2×4, 2×4.5, 3×4, 3×5. Max qty=2500. 5k requires custom quote: 747-888-7777.

closest_data_point.description: Square-Rounded / 3" x 3" / White BOPP / Matte Finish — spec 100% confirmed, price blocked by upload wall
closest_data_point.spec_delta: size=3" x 3" (EXACT), material=White BOPP (EXACT), qty=5000 available

competitor_results.notes: Configurator at /products/roll-labels/order: shape=Square-Rounded, size=3x3 (variantId=32), White BOPP (paper ID=12), Matte Finish, qty=5000 ALL confirmed. Price blocked: Vue.js cascade disables paper/finish selects until upload completes. REST API 401. Manual human click-through needed.

closest_data_point.description: Custom labels starting price (any size)

competitor_results.notes: $47 starting price from JSON-LD AggregateOffer. Free shipping, 4-day turnaround included. Upload-first site — no configure-then-price path. 5k pricing requires manual quote with artwork upload.

queries.comparison_notes: PRIMARY BENCHMARK. Our price $694.44 vs UPrinting confirmed $505.85 — we are 37% more expensive. VP directional at $544.86 (unconfirmed size). GotPrint spec 100% confirmed but price wall-blocked. Axiom no 3x3 option. SM upload-first.

all_captured_price_points.description: Index of all individual price points. See competitor-pricing-datacenter.html for interactive view.

points.note: Rounded Square default size — size not confirmed
DIRECTIONAL — W=3/H=3 injected into Cimpress, size not DOM-confirmed
Starting price only — free shipping included

roll_labels.gap: Price blocked by Vue.js upload wall for all specs. Spec confirmed (3x3 Square-Rounded, White BOPP, Matte, qty 5k). Manual human click-through needed to get price.
Upload-first site — no configure-then-price path. Only $47 starting price available. Manual quote with placeholder artwork needed for real qty pricing.
3x3/5k size not DOM-confirmed. $544.86 is directional from API injection. Need DevTools session to verify Custom Width/Height selections in Cimpress XHR.
No 3x3 in standard configurator. Max qty 2500. Custom quote required for 3x3 and 5k+ qty.

folding_cartons.note: UPrinting pricing curve fully captured (50-2500 pcs). No other competitor data yet. GotPrint, Vistaprint, Axiom, Sticker Mule all uncaptured for this product type.
Internal HP 15K pricing model not yet documented — can't calculate our_price for comparison.

stand_up_pouches.note: UPrinting pricing curve fully captured (100-5000 pcs). No other competitor data yet.
Internal Karlville poucher pricing model not yet documented — can't calculate our_price for comparison.

coverage_status_legend.live: Verified exact-spec price from configurator/API interaction
coverage_status_legend.partial: Some data captured but not for exact spec (reference anchor, starting price, or directional API result)
coverage_status_legend.blocked: Site requires upload or authenticated session; no automated price capture possible
coverage_status_legend.manual_required: Requires manual browser interaction or direct vendor inquiry

competitor_notes.vistaprint_packaging: Vistaprint does NOT offer folding cartons or stand-up pouches. All packaging URLs 404.
competitor_notes.gotprint_packaging: GotPrint does not offer folding cartons or pouches (catalog discovery confirmed, only "Folders" = presentation folders).
competitor_notes.stickermule_packaging: Sticker Mule: custom labels only. No folding cartons or pouches.
competitor_notes.packaging_competitor_landscape: For boxes and pouches, UPrinting is currently the only confirmed benchmark. Other dedicated suppliers (Packlane, noissue, PrintingForLess) would need separate exploration.
competitor_notes.gotprint_roll_labels: GotPrint roll label price still blocked by Vue.js cascade — paper/finish selects stay disabled after shape+size dispatch. REST API 401. Configurator selects did not render in headless (no DOM elements found in latest pass). Manual human click-through is the only remaining path.
competitor_notes.stickermule_roll_labels: Upload-first confirmed. $47 starting price from JSON-LD. 5k pricing requires manual quote with artwork upload.
